SELECT bitmaskToList(num) AS powers_of_two FROM test_table WHERE num > 0;
SELECT num, bitmaskToList(num) AS powers_of_two FROM test_table WHERE num < 16 ORDER BY num;
WITH (bitmaskToList(3) AS list_values) SELECT list_values FROM test_table WHERE num = 3;
CREATE TABLE test_table2 AS SELECT num, bitmaskToList(num) AS powers_of_two FROM test_table WHERE num BETWEEN 0 AND 15;
SELECT a.num, b.powers_of_two FROM test_table AS a JOIN test_table2 AS b ON a.num = b.num;
SELECT num, bitmaskToList(num) AS powers_of_two FROM (SELECT num FROM test_table WHERE num % 2 = 0);
SELECT num, bitmaskToList(num) AS powers_of_two FROM test_table WHERE num IN (1, 2, 4, 8);
WITH (SELECT bitmaskToList(7)) AS result SELECT result;
